SEO.title: Ayelen Llampa | Frontend Developer
SEO.description: Portfolio of a web developer specialized in React, Next.js, and JavaScript.

About.hi: Hi! I'm Ayelén, a Frontend Developer focused on building clean and scalable web applications.
About.techs: Over the last few years, I've worked on SaaS products where I was responsible for developing UI features, improving performance, integrating Stripe payment flows and implementing internationalization (i18n).
About.ux: I enjoy working with React, Next.js and TypeScript to translate complex product requirements into intuitive and accessible user interfaces. I care about maintainable architecture, reusable components and real-world performance.
About.background: Before transitioning into tech, I trained as an English teacher. That experience strengthened my communication skills, leadership, and ability to explain complex concepts clearly — qualities that now help me collaborate effectively in remote agile teams and contribute with confidence to frontend decisions.

Main.homeSubtitle: I invite you to know more about me and what I do

Projects.projectsSubtitle: Selected projects showcasing frontend architecture, performance and UI development

cheers.title: Cheers - SaaS Solution
cheers.description: Frontend-focused development of a scalable SaaS platform for beverage ordering. Built reusable UI components with React and TypeScript, implemented Stripe payment flows, internationalization (i18n), dynamic QR generation and an admin dashboard. Optimized performance and improved user experience across devices.

nearbytour.title: NearByTour - Travel Platform
nearbytour.description: Led frontend architecture using Next.js and TypeScript. Developed responsive layouts, interactive maps and dynamic experience cards with Tailwind CSS. Implemented geolocation features and optimized image loading for better performance.

aracellipmu.title: Goddess Permanent- E-commerce
aracellipmu.description: Freelance Next.js e-commerce project focused on conversion-driven UI/UX. Built responsive layouts, optimized SEO structure and improved performance, contributing to a 40% increase in client sales.

thinderpet.title: ThinderPet - Pet Matching
thinderpet.description: Developed the frontend of a pet matching platform with advanced search filters and swipe-based interactions. Focused on state management, responsive UI and smooth user experience.

tunematch.title: TuneMatch - Music Social
tunematch.description: Led frontend development using React and Tailwind CSS. Designed a responsive UI, implemented real-time private messaging and built interactive features to connect users based on musical interests.

videogames.title: Video Games API - Gaming Platform
videogames.description: Built a RESTful API with Node.js, Express and PostgreSQL, implementing CRUD operations and advanced search filters. Designed structured endpoints to support frontend consumption.

starwars.title: Star Wars Wiki - Fan Platform
starwars.description: Developed a responsive React application integrating SWAPI to fetch dynamic character and movie data. Focused on clean component structure and user-friendly navigation.

Experience.experienceSubtitle: Technologies, frameworks and tools I use to build modern frontend applications
